title: The Devil's Guide to Playing Circus Gallop with Your Fingernails, Step 4.26
description:
This shall be my longest video... for a very very long time.

And now, because I'm going to get some questions about these sources:
0:00 - Disney's "The Hunchback of Notre Dame"
0:18 - Spyro 2- Ripto's Rage
0:34 - Jay Chou's "Secret"
1:03 - Egoraptor's "Awesome Crossing"
1:17 - Seinfeld
1:39 - Disney's "Hercules"
1:56 - Tenacious D: Pick of Destiny
2:43 - The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya
3:22 - Azumanga Daioh
3:26 - Dot Dot Dot
3:53 - makemebad35's "A Demons Calling"
